name: Lyrics Authenticity and Quality
description: Guidelines for ensuring authentic, original, and high-quality lyrical content, including non-English vocabulary, brand avoidance, and AI-slop detection.

name: Suno Lyrics Technical Guidelines
description: Guidelines for using structural and mood tags in Suno lyrics, including reliability and usage limits for predictable AI outputs.

name: Vocal Performance Lyrics
description: Rules for matching syllable density and word choice to vocal register and phonetic rendering to optimize vocal performance in generated music.
